templatePrebuildDesc: Generates {{count}} recommended chapter outlines. Reorder index values any time.

prd.name: Product Requirement (PRD)
prd.defaultTitle: AI Smart Notes System - Product Specifications Handbook
prd.outlineContent:
# AI Smart Notes System - PRD Outline

> 📌 **Top Level Spec**: Aggregates function definitions, API designs, and UX guidelines.
> Click "+" to append new milestone chapters.

## 🎯 Product Mission
- **Zero Distraction**: Elegant minimalist writing layout.
- **Instant Query**: Inline instant searching on canvas and folder systems.

subChapters.title: Ch 1: Tech Stack & Lifecycle Hooks
subChapters.content:
## Ch 1: Tech Stack & Lifecycle hooks

### 1.1 Specifications
- **Base Elements**: React 18 + Vite + TypeScript
- **Design Styles**: Mobile-first Tailwind CSS
- **Global States**: React Context Store

subChapters.title: Ch 2: Flat Folders & Chapter Ledger
subChapters.content:
## Ch 2: Flat Folders & Chapter Ledger

### 2.1 Innovation Highlights
We designed flat "Book Collections -> Chapter rows" to completely bypass unnecessary traditional folder nested depth, allowing users to move up or down index states smoothly.

story.name: Sci-Fi Novel Series
story.outlineContent:
# Echosphere - Concept Saga Plot

> "When the ancient cosmic node fired, galaxies experienced cold freezes."

## 🎭 Worldbuilding core
- **Main Plotline**: A border outpost deck writer deciphers deep space quantum log signatures.

subChapters.title: Chapter 1: The Outpost Log Sig
subChapters.content:
## Chapter 1: The Outpost Log Sig

"Outpost 37 remained completely disconnected for three galactic years."

thesis.name: Academic Paper Draft
thesis.defaultTitle: A Study on Unobtrusive Front-end Interfaces for Maximum Flow
thesis.outlineContent:
# 🎓 Scientific Thesis Blueprint

## 🔬 Methodology
- **Quantitative Study**: Comparing distracting items in traditional editors.
- **Control Experiments**: Evaluating micro-animations on writing speed.

subChapters.title: Introduction: UI Noise on Cognitive Fatigue
subChapters.content:
## Introduction: UI Noise on Cognitive Fatigue

### 1.1 Premise
Excessive widgets and floating notification logs heavily decrease writing immersion.

wiki.name: Team Knowledge Wiki

# 📘 Developer Standards & Runbooks

## ⚠️ Core Commitments
- Strictly avoid "any" types in production TypeScript components.

subChapters.title: Section 1: Docker Compose Fast Launch
subChapters.content:
## Section 1: Docker Compose Fast Launch

```bash
docker-compose up --build -d
```
